title: strophopappus emarginatus
intro: Strophopappus emarginatus, also known as the "dune tickseed", is a flowering plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Strophopappus emarginatus include its ability to soothe and calm irritated skin, reduce inflammation, and promote healing. Strophopappus emarginatus is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and salves, and can also be consumed as a supplement after being dried and processed.
